query:
-- Contacts: add missing activity date fields
ALTER TABLE contacts
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastLoggedOutgoingEmailDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastModifiedDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS closeDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS firstContactCreateDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS firstDealCreatedDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastBookedMeetingDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ownerAssignedDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dateOfLastLeadStatusChange BIGINT;

-- Companies: add missing activity date fields
ALTER TABLE companies
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastLoggedOutgoingEmailDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastModifiedDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS closeDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS firstContactCreateDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS firstDealCreatedDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastBookedMeetingDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ownerAssignedDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS firstConversionDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS recentConversionDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dateOfLastLeadStatusChange BIGINT;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS closeDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS firstContactCreateDate BIGINT,
